raw_text:
76. AI-Based Tool Design Engineer

Job Summary  
Uses artificial intelligence and machine learning to optimize tool design, performance, and 
manufacturing processes.  
Key Responsibili ties 
• Develop AI -driven tool design models  
• Optimize tooling parameters using data analysis  
• Automate design processes  
• Analyze historical data for design improvements  
• Collaborate with data science and engineering teams  
• Implement predictive design solutions  
Required Skills  
• AI/ML fundamentals (Python, data modeling)  
• CAD and tooling design expertise  
• Data analysis and algorithm understanding  
• Problem -solving and innovation  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / AI / Data Science  
Experience  
• 3–8 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹50,000 – ₹1,20,000 per month
